summary: Unit tests for filterOverlayModel covering initialization, keyboard navigation, selection operations (toggle/all/none), confirm/cancel actions, and filter construction
notes: 9 test cases covering: initial state with empty/existing filter, cursor navigation (j/k keys), space toggle, a/n select-all/none, enter to confirm (empty filter when all selected vs name-based filter when subset), and esc to cancel. Uses makeOverlay() helper with 3 test sources (telegram, rss, reddit).
